<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val msg :
    ?level:[ `Err | `Msg ] ->
    ?duration:float -> ?onload:bool -> string -> unit
  val set_default_duration : float -> unit
  val action_link_key_created : bool Eliom.Reference.Volatile.eref
  val wrong_pdata :
    ((string * string) * (string * string)) option
    Eliom.Reference.Volatile.eref
end >>
